'''Margolis Mingla''' was the daughter of a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Knight]] and the mother of [[Cray Mingla]]. She watched over the [[Children of the Jedi|children]] at [[Plett]]'s house on [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]] including her daughter's future fiancé, [[Nichos Marr/Legends|Nichos Marr]]. She was constantly criticized by her sister [[Sophra]] because she was afraid she was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]].
